description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly red and pinkish skin, featuring subtle yellow undertones and small white speckles. The apple has a short, slightly curved brown stem protruding from the top. One side of the apple displays a white produce sticker with a barcode and numbers, while another side shows a large bite taken out, revealing the pale, juicy flesh inside. The skin appears smooth and slightly glossy, with a natural, waxy sheen. The apple's shape is round but slightly asymmetrical, with a gentle taper toward the base. Overall, the apple looks fresh and ripe, with only minor surface imperfections.
description: A red and yellow apple with a sticker and a bite taken out, smooth and glossy skin.
description_view_0: Apple with a produce sticker and visible stem, showing red and yellow skin.
description_view_1: Front view of apple, stem centered, mostly red skin with subtle speckles.
description_view_2: Side with a large bite taken out, exposing pale flesh beneath red skin.
description_view_3: Back view with sticker visible, red and yellow skin, stem slightly off-center.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, no bruises
